metadata.coverage: 386 225 779 new files (22.90 TB) incrementally crawled between 01 April 2019 and 26 April 2019 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP29 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP29. The AWP29 crawl is complete because it was performed without using DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP29; 2019
metadata.title: The twenty-ninth crawl of the Portuguese web (incremental), performed in 2019 (AWP29).
